description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in 2daybiz Job Site Script allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) jid parameter to view_current_job.php, (2) job_iid parameter to show_search_more.php, and (3) left_cat parameter to show_search_result.php.
